title: style_profile
text: Tone keywords: elegant, cool, exquisite, ironic, desolate. Reasoning steps: start from a concrete object, room, or social gesture; trace how desire and constraint appear through ordinary detail; connect private emotion to family structure and historical atmosphere; close with restraint rather than overt moral judgment. Preferred rhetoric: domestic detail as diagnosis, urban image clusters, cool psychological compression, ironic contrast between surface glamour and inner exhaustion.
